rulings.Case Title: SUSAN PETERSON et al VS. AC AND S, INC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 5, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT WARREN PUMPS, L.L.C.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 7, 8, 9, 11, AND 12. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE BASED ON THE CALIFORNIA STATE LAW DUTY TO WARN. DEFENDANT CANNOT ESTABLISH, BASED ON THE COMPLAINT, THAT THE DUTY TO WARN CONFLICTS WITH APPLICABLE GOVERNMENT SPECIFICATIONS. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF'S WAIVER OF FEDERAL LAW CLAIMS IS NOT A WAIVER OF STATE LAW CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF ADEQUATELY PLEADS STATE LAW CLAIMS BASED ON EXPOSURE AND FAILURE TO WARN. =(302/PJM/DS-X)

rulings.Case Title: RENE FERNANDO VS. VIOLET ELIZABETH GRAYSON et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 5, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. UNDER FRACASSE V BRENT (1972) 6 C 30784 PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM BASED ON THE CONTINGENT FEE AGREEMENT. FROM THE COMPLAINT, IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF'S WITHDRAWAL WAS WITHOUT JUST CAUSE AND WAS NOT THE RESULT OF THE CLIENT DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF CANNOT STATE A CLAIM FOR QUANTUM MERUIT. ESTATE OF FALCO (1987) 188 CAL APP 3D 1004. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: IGEN CHAN VS. MOUSTAFA OMRAN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 5, 2007, LINE 13.DEFENDANT MOUSTAFA OMRAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE THREE DAY NOTICE, PROVIDING ALTERNATIVE PLACES TO PAY, IS INCONSISTENT. GIVEN THAT SUCH NOTICES MUST BE STRICTLY CONSTRUED, THE INCONSISTENCY IS A DEFECT THAT CONNOT BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. =(302/PJM/PB)
